summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of PrintInterceptBlock on https://preview-polish.preview.emergentagent.com/pio-oci-aiff-sports-passport. All 13 functional requirements PASSED across two variants (anonymous Subscribe block + paid-subscriber nominate form). DOM portal, screen hiding, Chrome print emulation, Safari/Firefox class-based simulation, headline NBSP, burgundy color, @page rule, accessibility, validation flow, and network payload all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Component is clean, well-commented, lint passes with zero warnings.

Portal node `tsop-print-portal` is created lazily but never cleaned up on unmount — minor leak risk if many ArticleMockup instances mount/unmount in a long SPA session. Low priority since article pages are top-level routes.

The conditional `if (typeof document !== 'undefined' && !portalNodeRef.current)` runs in the render body (side effect during render). For React 18 strict mode / concurrent rendering, this is acceptable here because it's idempotent (re-uses existing node by id), but moving into useLayoutEffect would be more idiomatic.
fetch error is swallowed and submitted=true is set regardless (mirrors NominateReaderBlock fail-open behaviour — intentional per code comment, OK).
test_credentials: N/A — used ?preview=member query string to simulate paid subscriber per ArticleMockup.js line 47
context_for_next_testing_agent: PrintInterceptBlock at /app/frontend/src/components/PrintInterceptBlock.js is fully verified. Anonymous user (no ?preview=member) sees Subscribe → block; ?preview=member shows full nominate form. Form posts to /api/nominations/submit with 6 keys: subscriber_ghost_id, subscriber_name, subscriber_email, nominee_name, nominee_email, nominee_context. Use page.emulate_media(media='print') for Chrome and document.documentElement.classList.add('tsop-printing') for Safari/Firefox simulation.

anonymous_variant.headline_with_nbsp: PASS — exact match including U+00A0 before PDF
anonymous_variant.at_page_rule: PASS — '@page { margin: 0px; size: a4; }' found in stylesheet
anonymous_variant.accessibility: PASS — role=region, aria-label='Print intercept — please nominate instead'
anonymous_variant.safari_firefox_simulation: PASS — html.tsop-printing class hides #root and shows block
anonymous_variant.css_isolation: PASS — only one .tsop-print-only__cta element on page, inside portal

paid_subscriber_variant.form_rendered: PASS — all 4 testids present (name, email, context, submit)
paid_subscriber_variant.validation_name_only: PASS — 'Please enter a valid email address.'
paid_subscriber_variant.validation_invalid_email: PASS — 'Please enter a valid email address.'
paid_subscriber_variant.validation_empty_context: PASS — 'A line of context helps us reach out well.'
paid_subscriber_variant.successful_submit_network: PASS — POST to /api/nominations/submit captured with all 6 required keys
paid_subscriber_variant.success_ui_state: PASS — 'Sent. Jane Doe will receive the full story shortly — straight from us.'

regression.article_renders_on_screen: PASS — mockup-article, mockup-header, article-body all visible after print mode reset

test_results_detail.lint: PASS — ESLint zero warnings on PrintInterceptBlock.js
